metadata.reviewed_by: Digital Forensics Unit, Pune Cyber Cell

content: CCTV footage from House No. 19 shows the following: - 09:45 PM: Priya Mehta exits her bungalow in a white SUV (registration MH-12-AB-7890). - 11:15 PM: Priya Mehta returns to her bungalow. - 09:50 PM: A white sedan (Vikram Desai’s car, MH-12-CD-4567) is seen entering the service lane behind Arjun’s bungalow, but the camera angle does not capture the entrance. - 10:20 PM: The same sedan is seen leaving the service lane. - 10:45 PM: No vehicles are observed near Arjun’s property. Footage timestamps were verified against NTP server logs. No evidence of tampering found. Note: The sedan’s license plate was partially obscured in the 10:20 PM clip, but vehicle model and color match Vikram Desai’s registered vehicle.
